message:
feat(lab): opportunity scoring + perf gate unit tests (bd-1vy7d)

Add lab::opportunity module with OpportunityScore type implementing the
scoring formula (Impact × Confidence / Effort) and GateDecision logic
that mirrors the CI enforcement in perf-pr-check.yml.

GateResult includes structured reasons for CI log traceability:
- IMPLEMENT: score >= 2.0 with confidence/effort annotations
- NEEDS_EVIDENCE: score 1.0–2.0 with profiling guidance
- REJECT: score < 1.0 with impact/effort diagnosis

20 unit tests covering:
- Scoring formula (basic + all 5 docs examples)
- Gate decisions (implement/needs-evidence/reject + boundaries)
- Decision path reasons (structured logging)
- Input validation (ranges, zero effort)
- Monotonicity (impact↑, confidence↑, effort↑ effects)
- Boundary cases (max/min scores)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
